comments.comment: Extracted from O.Reg. 194 - decrease is due to: a) method of processing CEM data was improved, b) installation of an ammonia injection system to reduce emissions of NOx to meet the O.Reg. 194 reduction caps set for the facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Extracted fom O.Reg. 194: - decrease is due to: a) method of processing CEM data was improved, b) installation of a lime injection system to reduce SO2 emissions to meet the O.Reg. 194 reduction caps set for the facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: An ammonia injection system was installed in 2006 to help control the emissions of NOx.  A portion of the ammonia does not react with NOx and is therefore released.  The facility under went testing and amended its existing CofA to include this new system.
The emissions only occur from the kiln stack.
The substance is stored in enclosed containers and not recycled.
